# GitHub Milestones

## M0 - Foundation and Governance
- Repository structure finalized.
- Architecture and SRS baselines approved.
- Security and contribution policies approved.

## M1 - Control Plane Core
- Identity and tenant management requirements baseline.
- Project and configuration service requirements baseline.
- RBAC and policy model validation.

## M2 - Execution Plane and Validation Engine
- Queue and scheduler requirements finalized.
- Connector framework requirements finalized.
- Standard and regression validation catalog baselined.

## M3 - Reporting and Observability
- Result storage and reporting requirements finalized.
- Dashboard KPI definitions approved.
- Audit and monitoring requirements finalized.

## M4 - AI and Extensibility
- AI chatbot workflows approved.
- Plugin architecture and governance approved.
- Licensing and entitlement workflows finalized.

## M5 - Enterprise Readiness
- DR and backup strategy validated.
- Compliance evidence model finalized.
- Release governance and operational runbooks complete.
